# jamfschool_erase_device (Action)

Schedules a wipe on a device, erasing all content and settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Erase a device, clearing the activation lock.
action "jamfschool_erase_device" "return_device" {
  config {
    serial_number         = "C02ABC123DEF"
    clear_activation_lock = true
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `clear_activation_lock` (Boolean) Whether to clear the activation lock before wiping.
- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
